chapter: Chapter: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream

questions.question: Who is known as the Father of the White Revolution in India?
questions.explanation: Verghese Kurien led the White Revolution and transformed India's dairy industry.

questions.question: What was Verghese Kurien’s profession?
questions.explanation: Verghese Kurien was trained as an engineer.

questions.question: In which place did Verghese Kurien begin his dairy work?
questions.explanation: Kurien began his work in Anand, Gujarat, which later became the center of the dairy revolution.

questions.question: What major movement increased milk production in India?
questions.explanation: The White Revolution greatly increased milk production in India.

questions.question: What is AMUL?
questions.explanation: AMUL is a dairy cooperative that supports farmers.

questions.question: Which program helped expand milk production across India?
questions.explanation: Operation Flood was a nationwide dairy development program.

questions.question: What was the main aim of the White Revolution?
questions.explanation: The White Revolution aimed to increase milk production in India.

questions.question: Who benefited most from the dairy cooperative movement?
questions.explanation: The cooperative movement helped farmers earn better income.

questions.question: Why were dairy cooperatives important?

options.A: They helped farmers get fair prices

questions.explanation: Cooperatives ensured farmers received fair prices for milk.

questions.question: Which sector did Verghese Kurien help develop?
questions.explanation: Kurien helped improve the dairy industry in India.

questions.question: What product is mainly produced in the dairy industry?
questions.explanation: The dairy industry mainly produces milk and milk products.

questions.question: What quality helped Kurien achieve success?
questions.explanation: Kurien succeeded because of his determination and vision.

questions.question: Which state is Anand located in?
questions.explanation: Anand is a city in the state of Gujarat.

questions.question: What did the dairy cooperative system help reduce?
questions.explanation: Cooperatives helped remove middlemen and ensured fair payment.

questions.question: What was the result of the White Revolution?

options.A: India became a major milk producer

questions.explanation: The White Revolution made India one of the largest milk producers.

questions.question: What does the chapter mainly highlight?
questions.explanation: The chapter highlights the importance of cooperation and teamwork.

questions.question: What helped farmers earn better income?
questions.explanation: Dairy cooperatives helped farmers sell milk at fair prices.

questions.question: What type of text is 'I Too Had A Dream'?
questions.explanation: The chapter describes the life and achievements of Verghese Kurien.

questions.question: What value does Kurien’s story teach students?
questions.explanation: His life teaches the importance of hard work and dedication.

questions.question: Which product became widely available after the White Revolution?
questions.explanation: Milk production increased significantly during the White Revolution.

questions.question: What helped connect farmers and consumers across India?
questions.explanation: Operation Flood created a national milk grid.

questions.question: What did Kurien aim to improve?
questions.explanation: Kurien aimed to improve the lives of dairy farmers.

questions.question: Which system allowed farmers to work together?
questions.explanation: The cooperative system allowed farmers to work collectively.

questions.question: What quality helped Kurien bring change?
questions.explanation: Kurien’s vision helped transform the dairy industry.

questions.question: What is the main message of the chapter?

options.A: Dreams and determination can create social change

questions.explanation: The chapter shows how dreams and determination can improve society.
